style_guide: Painted kid-friendly spy adventure, warm animal trail field station, readable embedded props, no text inside generated images.

assets.prompt: A kid-friendly spy adventure Animal Trail field station with a field board, animal report, meat bowl, trail camera, rock habitat, and base gate embedded naturally in the painted scene; no readable text, no floating props, no oversized clue objects.

assets.decision: Keep the existing prop sheet for inventory reward icons only.

integration_note: Level 04 now uses a dedicated embedded-prop Animal Trail background. The existing SVG prop sheet remains referenced only for inventory reward icons.
